rationale.fidelity: Fully retains the one-threshold admission model, latent creator quality, noisy score, overlapping distributions, and expected error-loss objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Supplies a specific actor, rule choice, error trade-off, counterfactual thresholds, stakes, and implementation boundary.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Directly rejects novelty from a new label, identifies defensible theoretical, design, data, identification, and implementation contributions, and bounds any claim pending literature verification.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels priority and mechanism-change assertions unsupported and distinguishes model inputs requiring calibration.
rationale.prose_clarity: Well organized but substantially repetitive and overlong.
rationale.overall: Excellent fidelity and contribution diagnosis with no hard failure.
